Happy Birthday, Baby
Open me ↓
✦

Every photo here carries a little piece of our story.

The laughs we shared, the conversations that lasted longer than they should have, the memories we didn't know would become so special, and all the little moments in between.

Some of them may seem ordinary, but to me they're the moments that made you unforgettable.

So before we celebrate another year of your life, I wanted to look back at some of the memories that made this year a little brighter.

a letter
for you...

Happy 23rd Birthday
Baby, I don't think I tell you this enough, but having you in my life has made so many ordinary days feel special.

You bring comfort, laughter, and happiness in ways you probably don't even realize.

I hope 23 brings you more happiness, growth, and all the good things you've been working so hard for.

No matter where life takes you this year, I'll always be cheering for you.

Have the best birthday today. You deserve every bit of love, joy, and celebration. ♡
— always yours
with love, always
Happy 23rd
Birthday, Nugi.
I hope this little surprise makes you happy. ♡
